description: Cross-platform user-env-var onboarding helper. Detects the user's shell (zsh / bash / fish / sh / ksh / PowerShell) and persists environment variables to the right config — rc file for POSIX shells, HKCU:\Environment registry for Windows PowerShell, $PROFILE for PowerShell on macOS/Linux. Used as a dependency by other plugins that need to set env vars during onboarding.
name: env-setup
